content:
🔥 polyterm | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with advanced, real-time analytics and monitoring capabilities for Polymarket prediction markets directly within their terminal environment.
✨ Key Features: • Terminal-based monitoring and analytics for Polymarket • 20+ advanced analytics features (whale tracking, insider detection, arbitrage scanning, signal-based predictions, wash trade detection, UMA dispute risk analysis, market risk grading)
📖 Summary: PolyTerm is a powerful, terminal-based monitoring and analytics tool for Polymarket prediction markets. It provides advanced features for tracking market shifts, whale activity, insider patterns, arbitrage opportunities, and signal-based predictions directly from the command line.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 SpreadPaper | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To allow users to set a single, high-resolution image as a wallpaper that spans across multiple monitors on macOS, providing a unified and visually appealing desktop background.
✨ Key Features: • Visual Positioning • Live Preview • Flip & Scale • Save Presets • Multi-Monitor Smart Detection
📖 Summary: SpreadPaper is a native macOS application designed to seamlessly spread a single high-resolution wallpaper across multiple connected monitors. It offers a user-friendly interface for positioning, scaling, and flipping images to create a cohesive desktop aesthetic, overcoming the limitations of macOS's default wallpaper handling for multi-display setups.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ MacOptimizer | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To clean, optimize, and manage macOS system resources and installed applications through a user-friendly interface.
✨ Key Features: • System Monitor (CPU, Memory, Disk) • App Uninstaller with Residual File Detection • Junk Cleaner (System, App, Browser Cache, Logs) • System Optimizer (Startup Items, Memory Release) • Large File Finder
📖 Summary: MacOptimizer is a comprehensive system optimization and app management tool for macOS, built with SwiftUI. It offers a suite of eight modules to clean junk files, uninstall applications completely, manage startup items, release memory, find large files, manage the trash, and explore the file system.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 networking-toolbox | Svelte
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide system administrators with a comprehensive, self-hosted, and offline-capable suite of networking tools for diagnostics, analysis, and security.
✨ Key Features: • Offline-first functionality • 100+ networking tools and utilities • Self-hosted deployment options (Docker, Node, Static) • SvelteKit + TypeScript development stack
📖 Summary: Networking Toolbox is an offline-first, self-hosted web application providing over 100 essential networking tools and utilities for system administrators. Built with SvelteKit and TypeScript, it offers a comprehensive suite of diagnostic and analysis features accessible without an internet connection.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
